steps.t: Spalvi is feeling nervous about something, and wanted you to check the road you took from the Trollshaws to Eregion for suspicious signs. The road lea…
An axe is embedded in a tree by the side of the road that leads from Eregion to the Trollshaws.
Spalvi is in the ruins of Gwingris, in north-west Eregion. You found an axe embedded in a tree not far from Gwingris, and should bring it to Spalvi.
The Hollin Ridge is to the south-east of Gwingris. Spalvi has asked that you travel with him to the Hollin Ridge, from where you will have a good view…
Spalvi has asked you to stand near him and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> into the distance from the Hollin Ridge to see if you spy any of the Do…
Spalvi is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion.
Theodore Gorse is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion. Spalvi has given you the Rothstone to give to Theodore Gorse, since he has no more loyalty to …
Haley Meadowsweet is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion. Convinced that it was a fake and had no value, Theodore did not wish to take the Rothstone.…
Spalvi is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion.
